title: Athi's Airdrops
description: Customizable Airdrop System perfect for any survival server!
body:
![Athi's Airdrops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca23ae06104ceeca3701b2eb5184e0797b3a75d.png)


Bring thrilling airdrop events to your server with Athi's Airdrops. A fully customizable plugin that lets you create random loot crates with configurable chances, unique tracking mechanics, and PvP-focused crate locking!

Compatible With:
ItemsAdder | Nexo | MMOItems

## **Features**

**Customizable loot tables** - define what items drop and set custom chances for each loot.

**Compass tracking system** - players can right-click a compass to locate the nearest loot crate.

**Locked crates with timers** - crates stay locked for configurable seconds after landing, encouraging exciting PvP battles over loot.

**Adjustable spawn radius** - control how far from players or set locations the crates can appear.

**Custom messages** - all notifications, announcements, and action bar texts are configurable via the plugin config.

**Manual drops** - trigger airdrops on command.

**Lightweight & optimized** - minimal server impact with asynchronous handling.

**Easy to configure** - simple YAML config files let you tailor every aspect without editing code.

**ItemsAdder integration** - This plugin supports latest ItemsAdder Version. If you have it, you can add custom items to loot crates.

## **Commands**

```
/airdrop start       - Start automatic airdrop system
/airdrop stop        - Stop automatic airdrop system
/airdrop spawn       - Spawn an airdrop crate manually
/airdrop status      - Check current airdrop status
/airdrop reload      - Reload the plugin configuration
```

 
## **How It Works**

When an airdrop is started, a loot crate spawns within the configured spawn radius.
Players receive customizable messages announcing the drop.
Players use the tracking compass (right-click) to find the crate’s location.
After landing, crates remain locked for a set time, encouraging PvP combat over the loot.
When unlocked, players race to open the crate and claim the rewards.

## **Installation**

Download the .jar and place it in your server’s plugins/ folder.
Restart your server to generate the configuration files.
Customize loot tables, spawn radius, lock timers, and messages in config.yml.
Use /airdrop start to test your first airdrop!

## **Support & Contact**

Discord: [Athi's Workshop](https://discord.com/invite/PVVDJ7YE7b)

If you have any ideas or problems, join our Discord Server. I'm glad to help you.
